summary: Backend testing: 100% PASS (21/21 tests). Frontend testing: BLOCKED - Expo web preview not rendering due to Metro bundler/tunnel issues. All backend APIs functional and returning correct data.

integration_issues.issue: App stuck on Emergent splash screen - React Native components not rendering. Metro bundler appears to be in restart loop. Console shows 'Disconnected from Metro' error. No testID elements found, no visible text rendered.

react_native_issues.issue: Metro bundler not serving the app bundle correctly. Tunnel connection unstable. App HTML loads but JavaScript bundle not executing to render React Native components.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Expo Metro bundler/tunnel issue preventing frontend from rendering
Investigate why React Native bundle is not executing in web preview
Check Metro bundler configuration and tunnel connectivity
Verify expo-router is properly configured for web platform
Once frontend renders, test all 5 tab navigation flows
Test PIN lock functionality when app loads
Test Add Transaction modal navigation and form submission
Verify charts render correctly with react-native-gifted-charts

success_rate.frontend: 0% (unable to test - Metro bundler not serving app)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test transactions, categories, budgets, and settings with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional and tested. Frontend code review shows no issues, but Expo web preview is not rendering due to Metro bundler/tunnel connectivity problems. The app gets stuck on Emergent splash screen. Console shows 'Disconnected from Metro' error. Once Metro bundler issue is resolved, need to test: (1) Dashboard loads with balance card, charts, recent transactions (2) All 5 tab navigation (Beranda, Transaksi, Laporan, Anggaran, Pengaturan) (3) Add Transaction modal (4) PIN lock functionality (5) Transaction CRUD operations (6) Budget management (7) Settings and PIN set/verify/remove flow
rca_of_issue:
Root Cause Analysis - Frontend Not Rendering:

1. SYMPTOM: Expo web preview stuck on Emergent splash screen, no React Native components rendering

2. INVESTIGATION:
   - Backend APIs all responding correctly (verified with curl and pytest)
   - HTML page loads successfully
   - React Native CSS classes present in DOM
   - No JavaScript errors in console
   - Console shows 'Disconnected from Metro' message
   - No testID elements found in DOM
   - No visible text rendered
   - Metro bundler logs show repeated restarts
   - Tunnel connection unstable

3. ROOT CAUSE: Metro bundler is not successfully serving the JavaScript bundle to the web preview. The HTML shell loads but the React Native JavaScript bundle is not executing, preventing any components from rendering.

4. CONTRIBUTING FACTORS:
   - Expo tunnel connectivity issues (ngrok errors in logs)
   - Metro bundler in restart loop
   - Possible network/proxy issues between browser and Metro

5. MITIGATION: This is an infrastructure/deployment issue, not a code issue. Recommend:
   - Restart Expo service with stable tunnel connection
   - Check Metro bundler configuration
   - Verify network connectivity
   - Consider using local development server instead of tunnel
   - Check if CI mode is interfering with bundle serving
